stories.headline: Hegseth Hails China Relationship at Defense Summit
stories.summary:
Jabs at European allies and talks of stable US-China ties — Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth took to the stage at a security summit in Singapore this weekend. 

But two topics were notably missing from his address: Taiwan and the Iran war. Haslinda Amin with more. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Can California Convince Teens to Work in Construction?
